steps:
1. Basic wash price = £8.50 per car.
2. Premium polish adds 40% extra on top of basic wash price.
   Extra for premium = 40% of £8.50 = 0.4 × 8.50 = £3.40.
   Total for premium wash = £8.50 + £3.40 = £11.90.
3. Total cars washed = 12.
   25% had premium polish: 25% of 12 = 0.25 × 12 = 3 cars.
   So, premium cars = 3, basic cars = 12 - 3 = 9.
4. Earnings from basic cars = 9 × £8.50 = £76.50.
   Earnings from premium cars = 3 × £11.90 = £35.70.
5. Total earnings = £76.50 + £35.70 = £112.20.
